most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: We currently have no Twitter data about the target topic (Bridge scoping test). The highest-priority information gaps are: (1) whether the exact phrase or close variants are being used on Twitter, (2) which tweets/threads contain the phrase and what context/replies they have, and (3) who the influential/organizational accounts are that are posting or being mentioned (to map affiliations). To close these gaps efficiently and coherently, the next round must (A) capture explicit mentions, (B) capture broader variations and top posts, (C) check whether the topic is trending, and (D) drill into the most relevant tweet threads and the author(s) to map affiliations and recent activity. The planned searches use multiple endpoints (search, trends, tweet_thread, timeline, affilates) so results will complement each other and support follow-up network and conversation analysis.
